title: Pre-Award — University Application Information
content:
Standard institutional identifiers and registrations a Morgan State University principal investigator may need when applying for a grant. For questions, contact ORA at ask.ora@morgan.edu, 443-885-4044, or 443-885-8280.

Key institutional data:
- Unique Entity ID (UEI): KULSKCCZJT27
- Entity Identification Number (EIN): 52 6002033 B8 (if the application is character-limited, leave off the B8)
- North American Industry Classification System (NAICS) Code: 611310
- Standard Industrial Classification (SIC) Code: 8221
- Animal Welfare Assurance #: D21-01124 (expires 01/31/27)
- Contract Regis: suj6sb
- Human Subjects Assurance: FWA00003318 (IRB Ident: IRB00002142, Name: Morgan State U IRB1, City: Baltimore, State: Maryland)
- Commercial and Government Entity (CAGE) Code: 8U547
- Congressional District of Morgan State University: MD 7th (MD-007)
- Cognizant Federal Agency: DHHS, Ernest Kineer, 214-767-3261
- System for Award Management (SAM) Expiration Date: November 15, 2025
- Morgan's official address: 1700 E. Cold Spring Lane, Baltimore, MD 21251-0001
- Dun & Bradstreet or DUNS #: 879941318 (phased out as a key identifier on 4/4/2022)

The Office of Research Administration is located at Tyler Hall, Student Service Bldg, Suite 304, Baltimore, MD 21251.

The page also links to MSU's Certification as a Minority-Serving Institution (PDF dated 2024-02-12) and to MSU Single Audits (via the Comptroller's audited financial statements page).
